author: barnabasbusa
content:
do we wanna have a channel for `protocol <> apps`  where app devs could come to and get early hands on testing on devnets cycles for example, would be similar to l1 <> l2 channel just dedicated for app devs. 

If we end up doing focil with shorter slots in heze, I have a feeling that lots of app devs would want to be on the early devnet cycles, possibly as early as possible, and having a dedicated place for them to ask questions could be great.
